project_type: Node.js Express REST API (movie ticket booking) with React frontend - monorepo
language: JavaScript (ES modules, type: module in package.json)
build_system: npm scripts - no build step for backend (plain Node.js), frontend uses Vite
test_framework: No formal test framework - has scripts/verify.mjs that runs full integration tests against an in-memory MongoDB (will need rewriting for PostgreSQL)
verification_instructions: 1. npm install in backend (should have no mongoose deps, should have pg/sequelize). 2. Run node -e "import('./src/app.js')" to check imports resolve. 3. Run the rewritten verify.mjs script which tests the full booking flow.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - can install npm packages. No actual PostgreSQL server available locally for live DB tests, but can validate syntax/imports. The verify.mjs script currently uses mongodb-memory-server; for PostgreSQL we will use sqlite memory or skip live DB verification since no PG is available in sandbox.
contribution_requirements: Keep exact same REST API contract (routes, request/response shapes) so frontend works unchanged. Use ES module syntax (import/export). Follow existing patterns: layered architecture (routes -> controllers -> services -> models).
key_patterns: Controllers use asyncHandler wrapper. Services contain business logic. ApiError class for operational errors. sendSuccess/buildPaginationMeta for responses. JWT auth middleware loads user via User.findById. Booking uses 2-step lock/confirm with atomic operations. Reviews use upsert + aggregation to update denormalized rating on Movie.
directory_structure: backend/src/config/ (db, env), backend/src/models/ (7 Mongoose models), backend/src/controllers/ (6 controllers), backend/src/services/ (booking, seat, token), backend/src/middleware/ (auth, errorHandler, validate), backend/src/utils/ (ApiError, ApiResponse, asyncHandler, withTransaction), backend/src/routes/ (index + 5 route files), backend/src/seed/ (seed.js), backend/api/ (Vercel serverless entry), backend/scripts/ (verify.mjs)
